mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_basic_label t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.b_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.l_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.lId},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_basic_label t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.b_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.l_id like concat('%',#{kbBasicLabelEntity.lId},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_basic_label t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE AND t.id = #{id}
select id from kb_basic_label where l_id = #{l_id} and b_id =#{bId}
select b_id from kb_basic_label where l_id = #{id}
select mlable.name from kb_basic_label label join kb_basic bs on bs.id = label.b_id join kb_model_label mlable on mlable.id = label.l_id group by mlable.name order by count(1) desc limit #{TopNum}
SELECT kml.* FROM kb_basic_label kbl left join kb_basic kb on kbl.b_id = kb.id join kb_model_label kml on kbl.l_id = kml.id where kbl.b_id = #{basicId}
select * from kb_basic_label kbl left join kb_model_label kml on kbl.l_id = kml.id where b_id = #{basicId}
